title: Bye October!
excerpt: The month went too fast and I think I only spent 7 nights in my own bed. It was full of travel and work and projects and fun, but man oh man did it fly by much too quickly. I…
body:
The month went too fast and I think I only spent 7 nights in my own bed. It was full of travel and work and projects and fun, but man oh man did it fly by much too quickly. I need to take pause and slow down a bit so I can enjoy reflecting on all the goodness. Maybe I will try and do more of that next year. 2017 is going to be here before we know it! 

I used the Collect Photo App - just like I shared in July to capture this calendar highlighting a photo-a-day. I upgraded my phone and have been having issues with the photos transferring, but hoping to have that figured out soon. 

Here's also hoping November doesn't go by quite as quickly!  I have some exciting news to let you in on this Friday!
